# IEEE Diagram Guide

Use these repo-backed diagrams when the user wants technical or academic slides.

## Best Diagrams for Slides
- System Architecture Block Diagram
- Data Pipeline Flowchart
- User Flow Diagram
- Smart Ranking Algorithm Flowchart
- Body Measurement Algorithm Flowchart
- Sequence Diagram: Search and Ranking
- Sequence Diagram: Body Scan and Chatbot
- Docker Deployment Architecture

## How to Use Them in a Deck
- Put the system architecture diagram in the architecture slide.
- Use the data pipeline or smart ranking flow when explaining technical depth.
- Use the user flow diagram for product story and demo sequencing.
- Use the body measurement flow for try-on methodology.
- Use deployment architecture for DevOps or production-readiness slides.

## Citation Source in Repo
- Source material lives in `IEEE_DIAGRAMS.md`.
- If the user wants export-ready visuals, instruct to render the Mermaid diagrams to SVG or PNG.

## Academic Framing
- Present diagrams as implementation architecture and workflow diagrams.
- Pair each diagram with one short takeaway sentence.
- Avoid placing more than one dense Mermaid diagram on a single slide.
